nodes.summary: Green-breasted bushshrike（Malaconotus gladiator）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Green-breasted bushshrike。

nodes.name: Malaconotus
nodes.summary: Malaconotus（Malaconotus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Fiery-breasted bushshrike、Lagden's bushshrike、Green-breasted bushshrike等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Green-breasted bushshrike
nodes.summary: The green-breasted bushshrike or gladiator bushshrike (Malaconotus gladiator) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. It is found in the Cameroonian Highlands forests. With a total length of 25 to 28 cm (9.8 to 11.0 in) and a body mass of around 99 g (3.5 oz) this may be the largest of the Malaconotidae. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
